lines.text: Central Perk, everyone is there except Joey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Alright. Phoebe?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, okay. If I were omnipotent for a day, I would want, um, world peace, no more hunger, good things for the rain-forest...And bigger boobs!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, see.. you took mine. Chandler, what about you?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Uh, if I were omnipotent for a day, I'd.. make myself omnipotent forever.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: See, there's always one guy. (Mocking) "If I had a wish, I'd wish for three more wishes." (Joey enters.)

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Hey Joey. Hi. Hey, buddy.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, Joey, what would you do if you were omnipotent?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Probably kill myself!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: ..Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, if Little Joey's dead, then I got no reason to live!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey, uh- OMnipotent.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You are? Ross, I'm sorry..
Opening Credits
Central Perk, Ross and Monica are watching Phoebe sleep.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How does she do that?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I cannot sleep in a public place.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Would you look at her? She is so peaceful.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (waking and startling them) Oh! What what what! ...Hi.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's okay, y'know, you just nodded off again.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What's going on with you?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I got no sleep last night!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: My grandmother has this new boyfriend, and they're both kind of insecure in bed. Oh, and deaf. So they're constantly, like, having to reassure each other that they're having a good time. You have no idea how loud they are!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, if you want, you can stay with Rachel and me tonight.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thanks.
Chandler and Joey enter.  Joey is counting his steps.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: ...Ninety-five, ninety-six, ninety-seven. See, I told you! Less than a hundred steps from our place to here.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You got waaaay too much free time.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to Ross) Hey! Here's the birthday boy! Ross, check it out: hockey tickets, Rangers-Penguins, tonight at the Garden, and we're taking you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Happy birthday, pal!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: We love you, man. (Kisses Ross)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Funny, my birthday was seven months ago.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So, I'm guessing you had an extra ticket and couldn't decide which one of you got to bring a date?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, aren't we Mr. "The glass is half empty."

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh my God, oh- is today the twentieth, October twentieth?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I was hoping you wouldn't remember.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ohhh.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What's wrong with the twentieth?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Eleven days before Halloween.. all the good costumes are gone?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Today's the day Carol and I first.. consummated our physical relationship. (Joey is puzzled.) Sex. ..You know what, I-I'd better pass on the game. I think I'm just gonna go home and think about my ex-wife and her lesbian lover.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: The hell with hockey, let's all do that!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (trying to stop Ross leaving) C'mon, Ross! You, me, Joey, ice, guys' night out, c'mon, whaddya say, big guy, (Pretending to punch him in the stomach.) Huh? Huh? Huh?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (stops) I have no idea.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: C'mon, Ross!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Alright, alright, maybe it'll take my mind off it. Do you promise to buy me a big thumb finger?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You got it.
Rachel runs up cluching an envelope.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Look-look-look-look-look, my first pay check! Look at the window, there's my name! Hi, me!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I remember the day I got my first pay check. There was a cave in in one of the mines, and eight people were killed.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wow, you worked in a mine?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I worked in a Dairy Queen, why?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: God, isn't this exciting? I earned this. I wiped tables for it, I steamed milk for it, and it was totally-(opens envelope)-not worth it. Who's FICA? Why's he getting all my money? I mean, what- Chandler, look at that.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (looking) Oh, this is not that bad.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, you're fine, yeah, for a first job.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You can totally, totally live on this.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, by the way, great service tonight.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Oh! Yeah!
They all get their wallets out and give generous tips.

lines.speaker: Guys
lines.text: Hockey! (They go to leave but are blocked by three of Rachel's friends, Leslie, Kiki, and Joanne.  The guys pause to stare at them.) Hockey! Hockey. (The guys.)

lines.speaker: Leslie
lines.text: (looking around) Rachel?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! (Rachel, Leslie, Kiki, and Joanne all scream and hug each other.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (to Phoebe) I swear I've seen birds do this on Wild Kingdom.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What are you guys doing here?

lines.speaker: Kiki
lines.text: Well, we were in the city shopping, and your mom said you work here, aaand it's true!

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.text: Look at you in the apron. You look like you're in a play.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (to a pregnant Leslie) Look at you, you are so big I can't believe it!

lines.speaker: Leslie
lines.text: I know. I know! I'm a duplex.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (to Joanne) So what's going on with you?

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.text: Well, guess who my dad's making partner in his firm? (She points to herself and they all scream again.)

lines.speaker: Kiki
lines.text: And while we're on the subject of news.. (She holds up here finger to show off her engagement ring and they all scream again.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (to Monica) Look, look, I have elbows! (They scream.)
A Street, Chandler and Joey are kicking a can to each other.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: ...Poulet passes it up to Leetch! (Passes it to Joey.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Leetch spots Messier in the crease- there's the pass! (He kicks it to Ross, but Ross is staring into a shop window.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We'll take a brief time out while Messier stops to look at some women's shoes.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Carol was wearing boots just like those the night that we- we first- y'know. Fact, she, uh- she never took'em off, 'cause we-we- (off Chandler's look) Sorry. Sorry.
They walk on.  Chandler and Joey start to talk but Ross stops and whines.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Peach pit.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, Bunny?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (points) Peach pit. That night we, uh- we had-

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: -Peaches?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Actually, nectarines, but basically...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to Joey) Could've been a peach.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Then, uh, then we got dressed, and I-I... I walked her to the- (looks up, realises, and points) -the bus stop... I'm fine.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, that woman's got an ass like Carol's! (They turn to stare at him.) What? Thought we were trying to find stuff.
Central Perk, Rachel, Lesile, Kiki, and Joanne are talking.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So c'mon, you guys, tell me all the dirt!

lines.speaker: Kiki
lines.text: Well, the biggest news is still you dumping Barry at the altar!

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.text: Alright. Let's talk reality for a second.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.text: When are you coming home?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What? Guys, I'm not.

lines.speaker: Joanne
lines.text: C'mon, this is us.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm not! This is what I'm doing now. I've got this job-

lines.speaker: Kiki
lines.text: Waitressing?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, I'm not just waitressing. I'm.. I, um... I write the specials on the specials board, and, uh... and I, uh... I take the uh dead flowers out of the vase... Oh, and, um, sometimes Artelle lets me put the little chocolate blobbies on the cookies.

lines.speaker: Leslie
lines.text: Well. Your mom didn't tell us about the blobbies.
Monica and Rachel's, Phoebe and Monica are in pajamas and Monica is making something in the blender as Rachel enters.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, Rach. How was it with your friends? (She and Phoebe scream.) Okay! How would you like some Tiki Death Punch? (She pours the contents of the blender into some glasses.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What's that?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Weeeell, it's rum, and-

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. (Grabs the blender and starts to drink.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We thought since Phoebe was staying over tonight we'd have kinda like a slumber party thing. We got some trashy magazines, we got cookie dough, we got Twister... (The phone rings and Monica answers it.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh! Ooh! And I brought Operation! But, um, I lost the tweezers, so we can't operate. But we can prep the guy!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Uh, Rach, it's the Visa card people.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, God, ask them what they want.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (on phone) Could you please tell me what this is in reference to? (Listens) Yes, hold on. (To Rachel) Um, they say there's been some unusual activity on your account.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But I haven't used my card in weeks!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That is the unusual activity. Look, they just wanna see if you're okay.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: They wanna know if I'm okay. Okay.. they wanna know if I'm okay, okay, let's see. Well, let's see, the FICA guys took all my money, everyone I know is either getting married, or getting promoted, or getting pregnant, and I'm getting coffee! And it's not even for me! So if that sounds like I'm okay, okay, then you can tell them I'm okay, okay?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (pauses then on the phone) Uh- Rachel has left the building, can you call back?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Alright, c'mon! (Miserably) Let's play Twister!
Madison Square Garden, the guys are trying to find their seats.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (squeezing past people) Sorry, sorry... Uh-oh.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What? There was ice there that night with Carol? Plastic seats? Four thousand angry Pittsburgh fans?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, actually I was just saying it looks like we're not sitting together. But now you mention it, there was ice there that night... It was the first frost...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: C'mon, sit. Just sit down, sit.
Monica and Rachel's, they're all hanging out in the living room.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You should feel great about yourself! You're doing this amazing independence thing!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Monica, what is so amazing? I gave up, like, everything. And for what?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You are just like Jack.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: ...Jack from downstairs?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, Jack and the Beanstalk.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ah, the other Jack.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, right! See, he gave up something, but then he got those magic beans. And then he woke up, and there was this, this big plant outside his window, full of possibilities and stuff.. And he lived in a village, and you live in the Village..

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, but Pheebs, Pheebs, Jack gave up a cow, I gave up an orthodontist. Okay, I-I-I know, I know I didn't love him-

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, see, Jack did love the cow.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But see, it was a plan. Y'know, it was clear. It was figured out, and now everything's just kinda like...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Floopy?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So what, you're not the only one. I mean, half the time we don't know where we're going. You've just gotta figure at some point it's all gonna come together, and it's just gonna be... un-floopy.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, like that's a word.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, but Monica, what if- what if it doesn't come together?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: ...Pheebs?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, well... 'cause.... you just... I don't like this question.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, see, see, you guys, what if we don't get magic beans? I mean, what if all we've got are.. beans?
Madison Square Garden, the guys are watching the game.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Get him! GET HIM! Get him! Get- YESSS! Not laughing now, are ya pal!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to Ross) See buddy, that's all you need, a bunch of toothless guys hitting each other with sticks.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Pass it! Pass it!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: He's open!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Shoot! Shoot! Shoot!
The player shoots and the puck flies off the rink and hits Ross in the face.  Chandler looks concered until he notices...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, look, we're on that TV thing!
Chandler and Joey hold the puck and wave at the TV thing.
Commercial Break
An Emergency Room, Chandler and Joey are leading Ross in.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to the receptionist)'Scuse me.

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: (holds up her hand-she is on the phone) It says to call this number if you're not completely satisfied with this candy bar. Well, I'm not completely satisfied.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Listen, it's kind of an emergency. Well, I guess you know that, or we'd be in the predicament room. (The receptionist glares at him.)

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: (on phone) Hold on. (To Chandler) Fill these out, sit over there. (Tosses him some forms.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (jumping to his feet) Look, I don't wanna make any trouble, okay, but I'm in a lot of pain here, alright? My face is dented.

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: Well, you'll have to wait your turn.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, how long do you think it'll be?

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: (sarcastic) Any minute now.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, this- (she gives him a look and the guys back off) Heyy...
Monica and Rachel's, the slumber party continues.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm so sorry, you guys. I didn't mean to bring you down.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, you were right. I don't have a plan. (There's a knock on the door.)

lines.speaker: Pizza Guy
lines.text: (yelling from outside) Pizza guy!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thank God. Food. (She goes to answer the door.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Do you have a plan?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't even have a 'pl'.

lines.speaker: Pizza Guy
lines.text: Hi, one, uh, mushroom, green pepper and onion?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (miserably) No, no, that's not what we ordered... We ordered a fat-free crust with extra cheese.

lines.speaker: Pizza Guy
lines.text: Wait, you're not 'G.Stephanopoulos?' Man, my dad's gonna kill me!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (leaping off of the couch and runs up) Wait! Did you say 'G.Stephanopoulos?'

lines.speaker: Pizza Guy
lines.text: Yeah. This one goes across the street, I must have given him yours. Oh, bonehead, bonehead!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wait, was this a-a small mediterranean guy with curiously intelligent good looks?

lines.speaker: Pizza Guy
lines.text: Yeah, that sounds about right.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Was he wearing a stunning blue suit?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And-and a power tie?

lines.speaker: Pizza Guy
lines.text: No, pretty much just a towel.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (staggered) Oh God.

lines.speaker: Pizza Guy
lines.text: So you guys want me to take this back?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are you nuts?! We've got George Stephanopoulos' pizza! (Rachel pays him, Monica grabs some binoculars, and runs to the window.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh, Pheebs? Who's George Snuffalopagus?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Big Bird's friend.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I see pizza!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I wanna see! Lemme see! Lemme see! (She runs up and takes the binoculars.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hello? Who are we spying on?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: White House adviser? Clinton's campaign guy? The one with the great hair, sexy smile, really cute butt?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, him, the little guy? Oh, I love him!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh, wait.. wait, I see a woman.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Please tell me it's his mother.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Definitely not his mother.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, no...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, wait, she's walking across the floor.. she's walking.. she's walking.. she's going for the pizza- (Yelling) Hey, that's not for you, bitch! (Phoebe covers her mouth with her hand walks away from the window.)
The Emergency Room, Joey is miming hockey pucks kitting foreheads.  Chandler realises it's getting tense and goes to the receptionist again.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Excuse me, look, we've been here for over an hour, and a lot of people less sick than my friend have gone in. I mean, that guy with the toe thing? Who's he sleeping with? (She slides the gladd panel over and Chandler talks through it in a loud voice.) Oh, c'mon Dora, don't be mad... I know we both said some things we didn't mean, but that doesn't mean we still don't love each other. (To the waiting room.) Y'know, I feel like I've lost her.. (She slides the panel back, he turns, and it takes him by surprise.) Ba-!
Monica and Rachel's, the girls are all out on the balcony.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Light still out?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh. Maybe they're- napping.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh please, they're having sex.

lines.speaker: Monica and Phoebe
lines.text: Shut up!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So, whaddya think George is like?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I think he's shy.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah. I think you have to draw him out. And then- when you do- he's a preppy animal.
The Emergency Room, Ross is still going on about his first night with Carol.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I remember the moonlight coming through the window- and her face had the most incredible glow.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, the moon, the glow, the magical feeling, you did this part- Could I get some painkillers over here, please?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: He's right, enough, already. What is the big deal about today? So you slept with her for the first time, so what? You slept with her for seven years after that.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, it's just a little more complicated...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, what? What? What is it? That she left you? That she likes women? That she left you for another woman that likes women?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Little louder, okay, I think there's a man on the twelfth floor in a coma that didn't quite hear you...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Then what?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: My first time with Carol was... (He mumbles the last part)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It was my first time.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: With Carol? (Ross gives him a look.) Oh.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So in your whole life, you've only been with one-(He gets a look too)-oh.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoah, boy, hockey was a big mistake! There was a whole bunch of stuff we could've done tonight!
Monica and Rachel's, the girls are still out on the balcony.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. Okay, I got one. Do you remember that vegetarian pate that I made that you loved so much?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, unless goose is a vegetable...ha haaaah!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! Oh! Oh! Okay, fine, fine. Now I don't feel so bad about sleeping with Jason Hurley.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?! You slept with Jason?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You'd already broken up.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: How long?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: A couple hours.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, that's nice!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, okay, okay, I got one! (She sits up and the cushion she was leaning against falls off of the balcony.) Anyway- The valentine Tommy Rollerson left in your locker was really from me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Excuse me?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hello? Like he was really gonna send you one? (To Phoebe) She was a big girl.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really. Well, at least 'big girls' don't pee in their pants in seventh grade!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I was laughing! You made me laugh! (Monica and Rachel start to squabble)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: There he is! There he is!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Where?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Right- where we've been looking all night!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: He is so cute!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, George, baby, drop the towel!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Yeah, drop it! Drop the towel! Please drop the-(pause)-wowww.
The Emergency Room, Ross is absent.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Man. Can you believe he's only had sex with one woman?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I think it's great. Y'know, it's sweet, it's romantic...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, you kidding? The guy's a freak.. (Ross enters off camera)

lines.speaker: Both
lines.text: Hey, buddy.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi. (He is wearing a piece of steel bandaged to his nose.  He tosses some forms onto reception desk.)

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: (sarcastic) Oh, that's attractive.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, I thought you were great in Silence of the Lambs. Oh come on, admit it! All things considered, you had fun tonight.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Fun? Where was the fun? Tell me specifically, which part was the fun part? Where's my puck?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, ah- the kid has it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: The kid...? (To the kid) Excuse me, uh, that's, that's my puck.

lines.speaker: Kid
lines.text: I found it. Finders keepers, losers weepers. (Ross looks at Chandler for help.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You gotta do it, man.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to the kid) Oh yeah? Well, I'm rubber, you're glue, whatever-(to Chandler)-can't do it. (to the kid) Listen, uh- gimme back my puck.

lines.speaker: Kid
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: 'Yes', how about. C'mere. Gimme!

lines.speaker: Kid
lines.text: No! No! (They start to fight over it.)

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: Hey! Hey! No rough holding in my ER!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (tries to snatch it from the kid) GIVE ME MY PUCK!! (but it files out of his grasp and knocks out the receptionist)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: ...Now that was fun.
Closing Credits
Monica and Rachel's, Joey and the girls are playing twister.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Doing the spinning) Okay, Monica: Right foot red.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Could've played Monopoly, but nooooo.
There's a knock on the door, Chandler opens it, and silently hands back the cushion.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Thanks. (The guy nods and leaves)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, Pheebs: Right hand blue. (Phoebe has to bend over.)Good. (Joey stares at her butt appreciatively)
The phone rings and Chandler answers it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hello? Oh, uh, Rachel, it's the Visa card people.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, okay. Will you take my place?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Alright. (on phone) Yes, this is Rachel.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Nooo! (She grabs the phone and Chandler takes her place on the mat.) (On phone) Hello? (Listens) Oh, yeah, no, I know, I-I haven't been using it much. (Listens) Oh, well, thanks, but, I'm okay, really.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Green. To the green.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (on phone) I've got magic beans. (Listens) Never-never mind.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: To the left, to the left- aww! (They all collapse)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (on phone) Ohhh... I'm fine.
End
